tools.name: getOneTimeCode
tools.description: Request a one-time authentication code to be sent via email. This code is required for all other operations.

tools.name: startOptimization
tools.description: Start a route optimization job with multiple addresses. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.

tools.name: checkOptimization
tools.description: Check the status and results of a route optimization job. Returns the optimized route when complete. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.

tools.name: emailResults
tools.description: Email the optimized route results with navigation links to a specified email address. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "startOptimization" references sensitive artifacts (apikey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Start a route optimization job with multiple addresses. Authenticate with either (otpCode + otpEmail) or mroApiKey.
